title: Craftable XP Nuggets [Create]
description: A very simple mod that allows you to craft experience nuggets from quartz. Thanks to HipHo2 for the inspiration!
body: This is a very simple mod direcly inspired by HipHo2 and their Craftable Experience Nuggets Mod for Forge. I simply wanted a version for fabric so I set out to do so. I dont plan on continuing support for this mod as it is extremely simple, but if enough attention is garnered I suppose I'll get around to it. :]
